title: Cooked batch weight ledger
summary: snapshot-v2 exact pantry completion과 content-only batch 중량/잔량을 append-only event와 row-lock RPC authority로 잠근다.
goal: 요리 완료와 batch lifecycle을 session/content/exact pantry/weight/idempotency에 결합하고 legacy reader와 seeded-v2 drain을 보존한 채 R+2 공동 activation을 gate한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, implementation, security/DB, five-axis, design critic, product-design-authority, Stage 3/5/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078; runtime remains predecessor
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076; runtime remains exact effective ingredient predecessor
recipe-content-snapshot-future-propagation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1081; runtime remains predecessor
cook-mode-whole-board is currently implementation and must merge before #8 implementation
meal-log-core #9 owns linked consumed entries and cooked-batch-weight-ui #11 owns final visual completion

external_smokes: merged-exact-SHA remote read-only batch event function ACL RLS policy constraint capability inventory
two-owner exact pantry complete denial and multi-table digest smoke
idempotent complete and batch event replay/checksum concurrency smoke
known missing unrecoverable and weighted-unweighed state matrix smoke
legacy reader projection protected-update denial and XP no-repeat smoke
R/R+1 seeded v2 drain with current-previous UI and zero new writes
v1 optional-key shape compatibility and no-premature-428 smoke

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/cooked-batch-weight-ledger.test.ts tests/snapshot-v2-complete.test.ts tests/cooked-batch-security.test.ts tests/cooked-batch-compatibility.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security and DB review of complete atomicity RLS ACL locks events replay cleanup and release gates
separate Codex design critic of COOK_MODE exact-row and weight completion states
separate Codex screenshot-or-Figma product-design-authority before R
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 5 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: Meal-log entry schema API linked consumed pointer PATCH DELETE aggregate owned by #9
Final LEFTOVERS delayed-weight unrecoverable discard adjust and container-helper UX owned by #11
V1 strict route removal before separate #13 telemetry and tombstone contract
Servings-to-grams current-remainder substitution or mutable-current nutrition fallback
Generic reopen marked-unrecoverable reversal event update-delete or adjustment depletion
Discard mixed as eaten meal-log creation for unweighed closure or repeat XP
Existing legacy row fabricated content or weight backfill
New endpoint field status reason error screen or client authority
Unmerged remote migration production write or capability activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/DB, five-axis and design reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; implementation evidence is future. Runtime waits for #7 and cook-mode-whole-board. #8 owns complete/ledger/functional COOK_MODE/R-R1 gate, #9 meal-log links, #11 final visual completion, and R+2 activation remains Manual Only.
